title: Implement Kernel Phase 2: Unattended Runtime Substrate. Read these files first: - docs/kernel-unattended-runtime-substrate.md (full spec — THIS IS THE PRIMARY REFERENCE) - scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh (Phase 1 guard, already implemented) - scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh (existing ledger) - sc...
summary_text: Implemented Kernel Phase 2 unattended runtime substrate as new scripts: - [scripts/kernel-scheduler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/kernel-scheduler.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-claim.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-claim.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh) The scheduler now watches dispatchable work from queue JSON or a source command, coalesces repeated refreshes through deterministic claim files under `.fugue/kernel-state/claims/`, enforces one running item per project, prevents duplicate launches, persists scheduler state through the existing ledger, and writes operator status snapshots under `.fugue/kernel-state/status/`. The reconciler refreshes live eligibility, stops or downgrades active work with explicit reasons, and safely releases stale claims. The run driver writes workspace receipts, traces, logs, and structured completion/failure envelopes, then feeds those results back into claims and the runtime ledger. I also added focused shell coverage: - [tests/test-kernel-runtime-claim.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-claim.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-scheduler.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-scheduler.sh) Verification passed with `bash -n` on all five new scripts and all five focused tests. I left unrelated pre-existing worktree changes alone, including the already-modified `.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json` and existing untracked workspace artifacts.
